title: Shahnameh: Rostam and Sohrab
description: The most tragic episode of the Shahnameh: the hero Rostam unknowingly kills his own son Sohrab in single combat.
introduction: The most tragic episode of the Shahnameh: the hero Rostam unknowingly kills his own son Sohrab in single combat.

translation.original_text: کنون رزم سهراب و رستم شنو / دگرها شنیدستی این هم شنو
translation.text: Now hear the battle of Sohrab and Rostam — you have heard other tales, hear this one too.
